title: citrus × nana
intro: Citrus × nana, also known as the Dwarf Washington or Dwarf Washington navel orange, is a hybrid citrus plant that is a cross between the sweet orange (Citrus sinensis) and the pomelo (Citrus maxima). The citrus × nana plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory problems. Its health benefits are numerous, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant properties. The citrus × nana plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
